name: analyze_catalog_question
description: Search over the entire Alation catalog to find data assets and objects. This is the main catalog search tool that allows you to find tables, schemas, columns, articles, glossary terms, and other catalog objects. You can filter results by object types and apply custom field filters to narrow down results.

inputParameters.name: search_term
inputParameters.description: Search term to filter data assets by name.

inputParameters.name: object_types
inputParameters.description: Optional list of object types to search over. Common types include: table, column, schema, article, glossary_term, datasource.

outputParameters.name: results
outputParameters.description: Array of catalog objects matching the search criteria.

outputParameters.name: total_count
outputParameters.description: Total number of matching results found.

inputParameters.name: context_id
inputParameters.description: The unique identifier for the context to retrieve.

inputParameters.name: include_metadata
inputParameters.description: Whether to include metadata in the response.

inputParameters.name: depth
inputParameters.description: Depth level for context retrieval (1-5).

outputParameters.name: context_data
outputParameters.description: The context data retrieved from Alation.

name: Query Flow Agent
description: An agent that helps with query flow operations and data processing.

inputParameters.name: query
inputParameters.description: The SQL query to execute.

inputParameters.name: timeout
inputParameters.description: Query timeout in seconds.

outputParameters.name: query_result
outputParameters.description: The result set from the executed query.

name: bulk_retrieval
description: Retrieve data in bulk from the catalog.

inputParameters.name: batch_size
inputParameters.description: Number of items to retrieve per batch.

name: get_data_sources
description: Get available data sources from the catalog.

inputParameters.name: filter_active
inputParameters.description: Filter to show only active data sources.

inputParameters.name: source_type
inputParameters.description: Type of data source to filter (e.g., 'database', 'api', 'file').

name: bi_report_search
description: Search for BI reports in the catalog.

inputParameters.name: search_query
inputParameters.description: Search query to find BI reports.

inputParameters.name: limit
inputParameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

inputParameters.name: include_drafts
inputParameters.description: Whether to include draft reports in results.

inputParameters.name: signature_type
inputParameters.description: Type of signature to create instructions for.

outputParameters.name: instructions
outputParameters.description: Step-by-step instructions for creating the signature.

name: search_catalog
description: Search the catalog for various objects.

inputParameters.name: query
inputParameters.description: Search query string.

outputParameters.name: matches
outputParameters.description: Catalog objects matching the search query.

outputParameters.name: has_more
outputParameters.description: Whether there are more results available.

name: search_filter_fields
description: Search and filter fields in the catalog.

inputParameters.name: field_name
inputParameters.description: Name of the field to search for.

inputParameters.name: field_type
inputParameters.description: Type of field to filter by.

name: search_filter_values
description: Search and filter values in the catalog.

inputParameters.name: value_pattern
inputParameters.description: Pattern to match values against.

inputParameters.name: case_sensitive
inputParameters.description: Whether the search should be case sensitive.

inputParameters.name: max_results
inputParameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

name: Data Validation Agent
description: An intelligent agent that validates data quality and integrity across multiple sources.

inputParameters.name: data_source
inputParameters.description: Identifier of the data source to validate.

inputParameters.name: validation_rules
inputParameters.description: Set of validation rules to apply.

name: ETL Processing Agent
description: Agent that orchestrates Extract, Transform, Load operations for data pipelines.

inputParameters.name: source_config
inputParameters.description: Configuration for the data source.

inputParameters.name: transform_rules
inputParameters.description: Transformation rules to apply.

inputParameters.name: target_config
inputParameters.description: Configuration for the target destination.

name: calculate_metrics
description: Calculate various metrics from data sets.

inputParameters.name: metric_type
inputParameters.description: Type of metric to calculate.

inputParameters.name: data_points
inputParameters.description: Array of data points to process.

name: format_output
description: Format output data according to specified template.

inputParameters.name: template
inputParameters.description: Format template to apply.

inputParameters.name: data
inputParameters.description: Data to format.

inputParameters.name: pretty_print
inputParameters.description: Whether to pretty print the output.

name: Notification Agent
description: Agent that handles notifications and alerts based on configured triggers.

inputParameters.name: notification_type
inputParameters.description: Type of notification to send.

inputParameters.name: recipients
inputParameters.description: List of notification recipients.

outputParameters.name: notification_id
outputParameters.description: Unique identifier for the sent notification.

outputParameters.name: delivery_status
outputParameters.description: Whether the notification was delivered successfully.
